sources.title: The oldest forms of human communication

slides.eyebrow: Hisitori ya Mophato wa 4 - Legato la Magareng
slides.heading: Tlhaeletsano go Ralala Nako
slides.lead: Go tswa kwa meropeng le matshwao a mosi bogologolo, go ya kwa mangwalong, mogala, radio le inthanete gompieno.

image.alt: Moropa, lekwalo, mogala wa bogologolo le selefounu di le mothalong, di bontsha ka fa tlhaeletsano e fetogileng ka teng ka nako.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 160' role='img'><rect width='320' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M28 96 q26 -18 52 0 v20 q-26 16 -52 0 Z' fill='#8a4b2a'/><ellipse cx='54' cy='96' rx='26' ry='9' fill='#c8853a'/><rect x='108' y='84' width='52' height='38' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M108 84 L134 104 L160 84' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='188' y='80' width='40' height='44' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='196' y='70' width='24' height='14' rx='7' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='208' cy='108' r='6' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='260' y='72' width='30' height='54' rx='5' fill='#333'/><rect x='264' y='80' width='22' height='34' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='275' cy='120' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Amogela baithuti. Botsa baithuti gore ba ka bolelela tsala e e kgakala mafoko a a molemo jang gompieno (go leletsa mogala, molaetsa wa mokwalo, kgotsa bidio). Tlhalosa gore tlhaeletsano e kaya go abelana ka tshedimosetso, le gore batho ba ntse ba tlhoka go dira jalo ka metlha - fela didirisiwa di fetogile thata. Gompieno re tsamaya go tswa mekgweng ya bogologolo ya tlhaeletsano go fitlha kwa inthaneteng.

slides.heading: Tlhaeletsano ke eng?
slides.lead: Tlhaeletsano ke tsela e re abelanang ka tshedimosetso le batho ba bangwe ka yona.

blocks.text: Letsatsi lengwe le lengwe re **abelana ka tshedimosetso** le ba bangwe. Re a bua, re a reetsa, re a kwala e bile re a bala. Gape re dirisa ditshwantsho, matshwao le medumo. Tsotlhe tse ke ditsela tsa go tlhaeletsana.

items: Re tlhaeletsana go kopa thuso le go sireletsa yo mongwe le yo mongwe.
Re tlhaeletsana go abelana ka dikgang, dinaane le maikutlo.
Re tlhaeletsana go ithuta go tswa go batho ba bangwe le go ba ruta.

slides.notes: Dira gore se se nne le tlhaloso e e bonalang. Fa dikai tse di motlhofo: mme a bitsa ngwana gore a je dijo tsa maitseboa, morutabana a kwala mo boroto, tsala e dumedisa ka seatla. Supa gore tlhaeletsano e tlhoka mongwe go romela molaetsa le mongwe go o amogela. Kopa baithuti go bolela ditsela tse tharo tse ba ileng ba tlhaeletsana ka tsona pele ga sekolo gompieno.

slides.heading: Go bua le go anela dinaane
slides.lead: Bogologolo, pele ga go kwala, batho ba ne ba abelana ka sengwe le sengwe ka go bua.

blocks.text: Tsela ya bogologolo thata ya go tlhaeletsana ke ka go **bua le go reetsa**. Bagolo ba ne ba anela dinaane go ruta bana ka ba losika lwa bona, hisitori ya bona le ka fa ba ka tshelang sentle ka teng. Se se bidiwa **ngwao ya molomo** - go fetisa kitso ka molomo.

items: Dinaane, difela le maboko a ne a gakologelwa e bile a anelwa gape le gape.
Batho ba San (Basarwa) le Khoi ba Aforika Borwa ba ne ba fetisa hisitori ya bona ka tsela e.
Kitso nngwe ga e a ka ya kwalwa, fela ga e a ka ya latlhega - e ne e gakologelwa e bile e abelanwa.

image.alt: Batho ba dutse ba dikologile molelo fa motho a le mongwe a anela naane.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M96 118 q14 -30 28 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M104 118 q6 -18 12 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='50' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='43' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='170' cy='70' r='11'/><rect x='163' y='82' width='14' height='30' rx='4'/><circle cx='40' cy='108' r='10'/><circle cx='180' cy='108' r='10'/></g><rect x='20' y='126' width='180' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gatelela gore ngwao ya molomo ke tsela ya nnete e e ikanyegang ya go boloka hisitori, e seng e e kwa tlase. Ela tlhoko ntlha ya SAHO ya gore bajaki ba pele ba Yuropa ba ne ba akanya ka phoso gore fa go se na dibuka, go ne go se na hisitori - fela nako e e fetileng ya Aforika e ne e bolokilwe ka kelotlhoko ka dinaane, dikgakologelo le ngwao tse di neng di fetiswa ke bagolo. Kopa baithuti gore malapa a bona a anela dinaane dife.

slides.heading: Meropa, mosi le matshwao
slides.lead: O romela molaetsa jang kwa bathong ba ba leng kgakala thata gore ba utlwe lentswe la gago?

blocks.text: Bogologolo, batho ba ne ba bona ditsela tse di botlhale tsa go romela melaetsa go ralala sekgala se se telele. **Meropa** e ne e letswa ka mekgwa e e kgethegileng, mme mokgwa mongwe le mongwe o ne o bolelela baagisani ka dikgang kgotsa kotsi. **Matshwao a mosi** le melelo di ne di ka bonwa kwa kgakala mme di tlhagisa batho ka dilo tse ba neng ba tshwanetse go di itse.

items: Mekgwa ya meropa e ne e ka tlhagisa motse gore baeng kgotsa kotsi e a tla.
Mosi motshegare le molelo bosigo di ne di ka bonwa go ralala dikgala tse ditelele.
Barongwa gape ba ne ba taboga kgotsa ba palama go tsholetsa mafoko a a botlhokwa go tswa lefelong go ya go le lengwe.

image.alt: Thaba e nang le molelo o o rometsang matshwao a mosi kwa loaping.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M0 130 L70 96 L120 118 L180 92 L220 116 L220 130 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M96 120 q14 -22 26 0 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M100 120 q9 -12 18 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><g fill='#b7a98d'><circle cx='109' cy='86' r='9'/><circle cx='118' cy='68' r='11'/><circle cx='104' cy='52' r='13'/><circle cx='120' cy='36' r='15'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Dira gore se se nne le botshelo e bile se akaretse - o ka opa diatla ka morethetho o o motlhofo mme wa botsa gore a phaposi e ka 'bala' mokgwa o o boeletswang. Tlhalosa gore matshwao a a ne a bereka ka gonne mongwe le mongwe mo setshabeng o ne a dumalana gore mokgwa kgotsa letshwao lengwe le lengwe le ne le kaya eng. Se sa ntse se le boammaaruri le gompieno: tlhaeletsano e bereka fela fa re abelana ka khoutu, jaaka puo.

slides.heading: Ditshwantsho mo majeng
slides.lead: Melaetsa mengwe ya bogologolo thata mo Aforika Borwa e ne e pentilwe mo lejeng.

blocks.text: Batho ba San ba ne ba penta le go gaba ditshwantsho mo majeng le mo maboteng a mengobo. **Botaki jwa majeng** jo bo ne bo bontsha diphologolo, ditsoma le ditiragalo tse di botlhokwa. Ditshwantsho di ne di abelana megopolo le dinaane, mme tse dintsi tsa tsona di sa ntse di ka bonwa gompieno, dingwaga di le diketekete moragonyana.

items: Botaki jwa majeng ke nngwe ya mefuta ya bogologolo thata ya tlhaeletsano e e kwadilweng.
Ditshwantsho di re bolelela ka diphologolo, ditumelo le matshelo a bataki.
Ka gonne bo ne bo pentilwe mo lejeng, molaetsa o ne wa nna teng lobaka lo loleele thata.

image.alt: Lebota la leje le nang le ditshwantsho tse di pentilweng tsa batho ba tsoma tshephe.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 0 h220 v160 h-220 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a3b1f'><path d='M140 70 q18 -10 34 0 l-4 14 h-8 v18 h-6 v-16 h-8 v16 h-6 v-18 h-4 Z'/><circle cx='157' cy='60' r='6'/><path d='M138 96 l-6 10 M176 96 l6 10' stroke='#8a3b1f' stroke-width='3'/></g><g fill='#5c1414'><circle cx='58' cy='72' r='5'/><rect x='55' y='78' width='6' height='20'/><path d='M55 84 l-12 6 M61 84 l12 -6' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M55 98 l-8 14 M61 98 l8 14' stroke='#5c1414' stroke-width='3'/></g><circle cx='92' cy='70' r='5' fill='#5c1414'/><rect x='89' y='76' width='6' height='20' fill='#5c1414'/></svg>

slides.notes: Golaganya botaki jwa majeng le kgopolo ya go kwala molaetsa gore o nne teng. Go farologana le lefoko le le builweng le le nyelelang, setshwantsho mo lejeng se a nna. Se ke kgato ya ntlha go ya kwa go kwaleng. Fa kgaolo ya lona e na le mafelo a a itsegeng a botaki jwa majeng, a umake. Nna le tlotlo: ana ke mafelo a a botlhokwa a boswa a a tshwanetseng go sirelediwa.

slides.heading: Go go kwala fatshe
slides.lead: Batho ba ne ba ithuta go fetola medumo le megopolo go nna matshwao a re a bitsang go kwala.

blocks.text: Dingwaga di le diketekete tse di fetileng, batho ba jaaka **Baegepeto** ba bogologolo ba ne ba simolola go dirisa matshwao go emela dilo le medumo. Fa nako e ntse e feta matshwao a a ne a gola go nna **dialefabete** - ditlhopha tse dinnye tsa ditlhaka tse re di kopanyang go dira mafoko. Go kwala go ne ga letla batho go boloka direkoto le go romela melaetsa e e tlhomameng.

items: Go kwala go raya gore molaetsa o ka bolokwa mme wa balwa gape moragonyana.
Alefabete e dirisa ditlhaka di le mmalwa fela go kwala lefoko lengwe le lengwe.
Batho ba ne ba kwala mo letsopeng, lejeng, matlalo a diphologolo mme moragonyana mo pampiring.

image.alt: Momeno wa pampiri o nang le ditlhaka tsa alefabete le pene ya lofofa.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='50' y='34' width='96' height='96' rx='6' fill='#efe6d2' stroke='#b7a98d' stroke-width='3'/><rect x='64' y='52' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='68' width='68' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='84' width='52' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><rect x='64' y='100' width='60' height='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><path d='M150 40 L184 74 L176 82 L142 48 Z' fill='#2f5233'/><path d='M142 48 L150 40 L156 46 L148 54 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: E boloke e le motlhofo: go kwala ke tsela ya go taka mafoko a rona gore a nne teng e bile a tsamae. E bapise le diselaete tse di fetileng - naane e ka lebalwa kgotsa ya fetoga ka nako nngwe le nngwe e e anelwang, fela go kwala go boloka mafoko a a tshwanang. O ka bontsha phaposi ka fa leina la bona e leng mothalo wa ditlhaka tsa alefabete ka teng. Selaete se se golaganya lefatshe la bogologolo le didirisiwa tsa segompieno tse di latelang.

slides.heading: Go gatisa dibuka le dikuranta
slides.lead: Lobaka lo loleele buka nngwe le nngwe e ne e tshwanetse go kwalololwa ka seatla, nngwe ka nako.

blocks.text: Mo e ka nnang dingwaga di le 600 tse di fetileng go ne ga gakololwa motshine o o bidiwang **motshine wa go gatisa**. O ne o kgona go gatisa tsebe e e tshwanang makgetlho a mantsi, ka bonako. Jaanong dibuka le **dikuranta** di ne di ka dirwa ka bontsi jo bogolo, ka jalo batho ba bantsi ba ne ba ka bala tshedimosetso e e tshwanang.

items: Pele ga go gatisa, dibuka di ne di le mmalwa e bile di tura thata.
Go gatisa go ne ga dira gore dibuka di nne tlhotlhwa e e kwa tlase, ka jalo batho ba bantsi ba ithuta go bala.
Dikuranta di ne di letla batho ba bantsi go abelana ka dikgang tse di tshwanang ka nako e le nngwe.

image.alt: Mokgobo wa dibuka tse di gatisitsweng go bapa le kuranta e e mennweng.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='36' y='96' width='70' height='16' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='40' y='80' width='70' height='16' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='36' y='64' width='70' height='16' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='40' y='48' width='70' height='16' fill='#3f6b45'/><rect x='128' y='52' width='60' height='72' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2'/><rect x='136' y='60' width='44' height='8' fill='#333'/><rect x='136' y='74' width='20' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='160' y='74' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='84' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/><rect x='160' y='94' width='20' height='6' fill='#999'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gatelela phetogo e kgolo: go gatisa go ne ga letla tshedimosetso go anamela batho ba bantsi ka nako e le nngwe, e seng fela ba se kae ba ba neng ba na le dibuka tse di kwalolotsweng ka seatla. Botsa baithuti gore ba sa ntse ba bona mafoko a a gatisitsweng kae gompieno (dibuka, dikuranta, mabokoso a dijo tsa mesong, diphousetara). Ela tlhoko gore se se ne ga dira gore go ithuta le dikgang di nne teng mo bathong ba bantsi thata.

slides.heading: Poso: mangwalo kgakala le bophara
slides.lead: O romela mafoko a gago jang kwa mothong yo o mo toropong e nngwe?

blocks.text: Batho ba ne ba kwala **mangwalo** mme ba a romela ka **thulaganyo ya poso**. Mangwalo a ne a tsholwa ke batho ka dinao, ka pitse, ka sekepe mme moragonyana ka terena le sefofane. Lekwalo le ne le ka tshola mafoko a gago a a tlhomameng go ya kwa ba losika le ditsala tse di kgakala.

items: O tsenya lekwalo mo enfelopong mme o tsenya setempe le aterese.
Kantoro ya poso e kgoboketsa mangwalo mme e a romela kwa lefelong le le siameng.
Lekwalo le ne le ka tsaya malatsi kgotsa dibeke go goroga kwa kgakala.

image.alt: Enfelopo e nang le setempe e tsenngwa mo lebokosong la poso.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='120' y='56' width='56' height='84' rx='8' fill='#8a1f1f'/><rect x='128' y='66' width='40' height='8' rx='2' fill='#2b0d0d'/><rect x='106' y='40' width='40' height='28' fill='#fff' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/><rect x='128' y='34' width='12' height='12' fill='#e8a13a' transform='rotate(-14 134 40)'/><path d='M106 46 L126 60 L146 46' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='2' transform='rotate(-14 126 54)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dira gore thulaganyo ya poso e utlwale e le ya nnete - baithuti ba bantsi ba ka tswa ba sa ntse ba amogela diphuthelwana. Supa aterese le setempe e le 'khoutu' e e isang lekwalo kwa legaeng le le siameng. Bapisa nako ya go leta (malatsi kgotsa dibeke) le melaetsa e e bonako ya gompieno, e leng kgolagano e e siameng go ya diselaeteng tse di latelang.

slides.heading: Teleforafo le mogala
slides.lead: Metshine e mesha e ne ya letla melaetsa go tsamaya e batla e le ka bonako jaaka logadima, go ralala megala.

blocks.text: **Teleforafo** e ne e romela melaetsa jaaka matshwao a makhutshwane le a maleele go ralala megala e dirisa khoutu e e kgethegileng. Morago ga moo, **mogala**, o o gakolotsweng ka 1876, o ne wa letla batho go utlwa mantswe a ba bangwe go ralala dikgala tse ditelele. Ka lekgetlho la ntlha o ne o ka bua le mongwe yo o kgakala, ka bonako.

items: Teleforafo e ne e romela melaetsa ka khoutu ya dintlha le methalo.
Mogala o ne o letla batho go bua le go reetsa ka nako ya mmatota.
Metshine e e ne ya dira gore tlhaeletsano e nne ka bonako go gaisa lekwalo.

image.alt: Mogala wa bogologolo o nang le sethontshi se se robetseng kwa godimo le sediko sa go leletsa kwa pele.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='60' y='78' width='80' height='56' rx='8' fill='#2f5233'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='16' fill='#dcd3c2'/><circle cx='100' cy='108' r='7' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='58' y='60' width='84' height='16' rx='8' fill='#1f3a24'/><path d='M58 68 q-14 -2 -14 12 M142 68 q14 -2 14 12' stroke='#1f3a24' stroke-width='6' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M140 120 q30 6 34 30' fill='none' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Selekanyo sa Mophato wa 4: tsepamisa mogopolo mo kgopolong e kgolo ya gore mantswe jaanong a ne a ka tsamaya kgakala go ralala megala. O ka umaka Alexander Graham Bell jaaka motho yo o golaganngwang le mogala ka 1876. [SME] Netefatsa letsatsi la go tsenngwa ga mogala le teleforafo mo Aforika Borwa fa go batlwa letsatsi la selegae. Kopa baithuti go akanya go utlwa lentswe la nkoko kgotsa ntatemogolo ka lekgetlho la ntlha go tswa kgakala.

slides.heading: Radio le thelebishene
slides.lead: Jaanong melaetsa e ne e ka fitlha go batho ba le diketekete ka nako e le nngwe, kwa ntle ga megala.

blocks.text: **Radio** e romela modumo ka moya, ka jalo batho ba bantsi ba ka reetsa dikgang, mmino le dinaane tse di tshwanang ka nako e le nngwe. Moragonyana, **thelebishene** ya oketsa ditshwantsho tse di tsamayang mo modumong. Mo Aforika Borwa, dikgaso tsa radio di ne tsa simolola ka bo1930 mme thelebishene ya simolola ka 1976.

items: Radio e ne e tlisa dikgang, mmino le metshameko mo magaeng a batho.
Thelebishene ya oketsa ditshwantsho, ka jalo re ne re ka bona ditiragalo mmogo le go di utlwa.
Kgaso e le nngwe e ne e ka fitlha go batho ba bantsi go ralala naga ka nako e le nngwe.

image.alt: Radio ya bogologolo e nang le didiko le thelebishene e bontsha makhubu a a tswang mo antenneng.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='24' y='70' width='72' height='60' rx='6' fill='#8a5a3a'/><circle cx='44' cy='100' r='12' fill='#dcd3c2'/><rect x='62' y='84' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='96' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='62' y='108' width='26' height='6' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='120' y='74' width='76' height='56' rx='6' fill='#2f5233'/><rect x='128' y='82' width='60' height='40' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M158 74 L150 50 M158 74 L172 52' stroke='#333' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 44 q6 4 8 0 M144 40 q12 8 20 0' fill='none' stroke='#e8a13a' stroke-width='3'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gatelela tlolo e e yang kgasong: molaetsa o le mongwe o fitlha go diketekete ka motsotso o le mongwe. [SME] Netefatsa matsatsi a dikgaso tsa Aforika Borwa - dikgaso tsa radio mo Aforika Borwa gantsi di beelwa mo bo1920-1930 (SABC e ne ya thastilwe ka 1936) mme thelebishene ya bosetshaba ya simolola ka 1976; netefatsa tlhomamiso pele ga tlhagiso. Botsa baithuti gore ke efe e ba e dirisang thata gompieno, radio kgotsa thelebishene, le gore ke ka ntlha yang.

slides.heading: Dikhomphiutha, inthanete le diselefounu
slides.lead: Gompieno re ka romela mafoko, ditshwantsho le mantswe go dikologa lefatshe ka metsotswana.

blocks.text: **Dikhomphiutha** le **inthanete** di golaganya batho lefatshe ka bophara. Re romela di-imeile le melaetsa, re abelana ka dinepe mme re letsetsa ba losika ka bidio kwa dinageng tse dingwe. **Diselefounu** di re letla go dira tsotlhe tse go tswa mo dipotleng tsa rona, e batla e le gongwe le gongwe kwa re yang teng.

items: Inthanete e re letla go romela molaetsa go ralala lefatshe ka metsotswana.
Selefounu se ka letsa, sa romela melaetsa ya mokwalo, sa tsaya dinepe mme sa tsena mo inthaneteng.
Jaanong re ka bona le go utlwa batho ba ba kgakala ka nako e le nngwe fela.

image.alt: Khomphiutha ya lepthopo le selefounu di nang le seruarua sa puo se se bontshang gore di golagane.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='56' width='84' height='54' rx='4' fill='#333'/><rect x='36' y='62' width='72' height='42' fill='#8fd0e8'/><path d='M24 110 h96 l8 12 h-112 Z' fill='#666'/><rect x='168' y='50' width='40' height='68' rx='6' fill='#333'/><rect x='172' y='58' width='32' height='48' fill='#8fd0e8'/><circle cx='188' cy='112' r='3' fill='#dcd3c2'/><path d='M120 60 q28 -18 44 6' fill='none' stroke='#2f5233' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='5 5'/><circle cx='142' cy='48' r='4' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: E golaganye le matshelo a baithuti - ba bantsi ba tla bo ba itse diselefounu le inthanete sentle. Ela tlhoko gore inthanete e ne ya dirisiwa ka bophara ka bo1990 mme diselefounu tsa nna tlwaelo mo Aforika Borwa ka bo1990 gape. [SME] Netefatsa tlhomamiso ya go tsenngwa ga diselefounu mo Aforika Borwa (dinetwereke tsa mogala wa letheka di ne tsa simolola ka 1994) fa letsatsi le dirisiwa. Botsa: selefounu se ka dira eng se lekwalo le sa kgoneng, mme lekwalo le sa ntse le ka dira eng sentle?

slides.heading: Tlhaeletsano go ralala nako

blocks.alt: Molatlha wa nako wa tlhaeletsano go tswa go go anela dinaane ka molomo le botaki jwa majeng, go ralala go kwala, go gatisa, poso, mogala, radio, thelebishene le inthanete.

events.label: Go bua, go anela dinaane, meropa le matshwao a mosi
Botaki jwa majeng jo bo pentilweng ke batho ba San
Go kwala le dialefabete di a simolola
Motshine wa go gatisa o dira dibuka tse dintsi
Mogala o letla mantswe go tsamaya kgakala
Dikgaso tsa radio di fitlha magaeng a Aforika Borwa
Thelebishene e simolola mo Aforika Borwa
Inthanete le diselefounu di anama ka bophara

slides.notes: Dirisa selaete se go sekaseka loeto lotlhe ka thulaganyo. Supa mokgwa: kwa tshimologong melaetsa e ne e tsamaya ka bonya e bile e fitlha go batho ba se kae, mme fa nako e ntse e feta e ne ya nna ka bonako ya bo ya fitlha go batho ba bantsi. [SME] Matsatsi a radio ya bo1930 le motshine wa go gatisa wa 1440 ke matsatsi a a ka nnang a thuto - netefatsa pele ga tlhagiso. Botsa baithuti gore ke tlhamo efe e ba akanyang gore e fetotse matshelo a batho go feta tsotlhe.

slides.eyebrow: Se se tshwanang le se se farologaneng
slides.heading: Se se fetogileng, le se se saletseng se tshwana
slides.lead: Didirisiwa di fetogile thata, fela lebaka la go bo re tlhaeletsana le saletse le tshwana.

blocks.heading: Se sa ntse se tshwana
blocks.text: Re sa ntse re tlhaeletsana go abelana ka dikgang, go kopa thuso, le go nna gaufi le batho ba re ba ratang.

blocks.heading: Ka bonako thata
blocks.text: Molaetsa o o kileng wa tsaya dibeke ka lekwalo jaanong o tsaya metsotswana fela mo inthaneteng.

blocks.heading: O fitlha go batho ba bantsi
blocks.text: Moropa o ne o fitlha motse o le mongwe; inthanete e ka fitlha lefatshe lotlhe.

slides.notes: Ntsha kgopolo ya CAPS ya phetogo le tswelelopele. Se se fetogileng: lobelo, sekgala le palo ya batho ba re ka ba fitlhelang. Se se saletseng se tshwana: tlhokego ya botho ya go abelana ka tshedimosetso le go nna re golagane. Se se thusa baithuti go bona hisitori e le phetogo mmogo le dilo tse di tswelelang. Laletsa dikai go tswa mo malapeng a bona.

slides.heading: A re tlhole se re se ithutileng
slides.lead: Tlhaeletsano e godile go tswa go dinaane tse di buiwang le meropa go fitlha kwa inthaneteng - fela maikaelelo a yona a sala a tshwana.

blocks.text: Re tsamaile go tswa go **go bua, meropa le matshwao a mosi**, go ya go **botaki jwa majeng le go kwala**, go ya go **go gatisa, poso, mogala, radio, thelebishene** mme la bofelo **inthanete le diselefounu**. Sedirisiwa sengwe le sengwe se sesha se ne se letla melaetsa go tsamaya ka bonako le go fitlha go batho ba bantsi.

blocks.question: Bolela ditsela tse pedi tse batho ba neng ba tlhaeletsana ka tsona bogologolo, pele ga go kwala.
Tlhalosa ka fa mogala o fetotseng tsela e batho ba neng ba tlhaeletsana ka teng ka gona.
Tlhopha sedirisiwa se le sengwe sa segompieno (radio, thelebishene, inthanete kgotsa selefounu) mme o bolele gore ke ka ntlha yang se le mosola.

slides.notes: Dirisa dipotso tse tharo jaaka tshekatsheko e e buiwang kgotsa e e kwadilweng. Dikarabo tse di akantshiwang: (1) tse pedi dife kapa dife tsa go bua kgotsa go anela dinaane, meropa, matshwao a mosi, barongwa, botaki jwa majeng; (2) o ne o letla batho go utlwa mantswe a ba bangwe go ralala dikgala tse ditelele, ka bonako, go na le go leta lekwalo; (3) amogela lebaka lengwe le lengwe le le utlwalang - o fitlha go batho ba bantsi, ka bonako, o tlisa dikgang e bile o re letla go nna re golagane. Konela ka go kopa baithuti go akanya gore tlhaeletsano e ka nna jang fa ba godile.
